title: SRS airbag system structure description - SRS unit
section: Driver assistance SRS airbags seat belts

blocks.text: SRS airbag system structure description - SRS unit

items.text: Power circuits (step-up circuits, backup power supplies): provide power in case of a drop in battery voltage or a power failure in the event of a crash.
Frontal and side impact G-sensors: Detects the impact input to the SRS unit as acceleration and converts it into an electrical signal.
Crash detection unit: uses a collision detection algorithm to determine whether or not a collision should trigger (deploy) an airbag or other device.
Diagnostic section: Self-diagnoses the presence or absence of system abnormalities and illuminates the SRS warning light in the combination meter if an abnormality is detected.
Non-volatile memory: stores fault conditions. (Disconnecting the 12V battery terminal does not erase the memory.)
Communication circuit: Communication circuit for outputting or erasing the contents of memory.

blocks.text: This vehicle uses a DENSO or TRW SRS unit, depending on the specifications. to check the manufacturer name of the SRS unit, use HDS to check the ECU manufacturer displayed in the data list.
Automatic short-circuit mechanism for SRS unit coupler (SRS units manufactured by TRW)

The coupler connected to the TRW SRS unit is equipped with an automatic short-circuit mechanism that prevents the driver/front passenger airbag, driver/front passenger seat belt pretensioner, driver/front passenger side airbag, and right/left side curtain airbag from malfunctioning when disconnected. This automatic short-circuit mechanism is designed to short-circuit the respective deployment side circuits (adjacent terminals) when the coupler is disconnected.

The couplers connected to the SRS unit are equipped with terminals that short-circuit the mating detection terminals. When the couplers are properly connected, the mating detection terminals short-circuit each other, and the SRS unit detects the mating of each coupler. If the SRS unit is activated without detecting an interlock, it judges that the interlock is faulty and stores the DTC.
